scenes.title: Drone approach
scenes.prompt: Cinematic aerial drone shot slowly approaching a solitary white lighthouse on a rocky headland at dawn, soft golden light breaking through mist, waves far below, gentle deliberate push-in, photorealistic, 16:9 film look

scenes.title: Waves at the rocks
scenes.prompt: Low angle cinematic shot of powerful ocean waves crashing against dark wet rocks below a white lighthouse at dawn, sea spray catching golden light, slow motion feel, photorealistic, 16:9 film look

scenes.title: Spiral stairs
scenes.prompt: Interior of a white lighthouse: cinematic tracking shot climbing a narrow spiral iron staircase upward, shafts of warm dawn light through small windows, dust motes, handheld subtle movement, photorealistic, 16:9 film look

scenes.title: Beacon sweep
scenes.prompt: Silhouette of a lighthouse keeper in the glass lamp room as the rotating beacon light sweeps past camera at dawn, blue and gold color grade, cinematic interior, photorealistic, 16:9 film look
